my-crypto-heroes.Description: My Crypto Heroes (MCH) is a Blockchain PRG game. Collect and train historical Heroes of the world and fight with them. maker-vault-owner.Description: A Maker Vault allows a user to deposit cryptocurrency collateral and generate Dai. Vaults are categorized by the type of collateral used to generated Dai.
